comment: Shared vocabulary for all TPR datasets. Reference from dataset schemas as {"$ref": "common#<name>"}. Extend here first; never inline new vocabulary in a single dataset schema.

side.description: Side of street a regulation applies to

direction_set.description: One or more comma-separated directions, or 'all' for all approaches

time_ranges.description: One or more comma-separated 24-hour HH:MM-HH:MM time windows

days.description: Comma-separated day tokens; school_days = Newton Public Schools in session

speed_mph.description: Speed limit in miles per hour

source_text.description: Verbatim source clause, whitespace-collapsed; the row's provenance
